task_completion.description: Verify that Find & Replace operations were performed to localize the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text should show localized names (e.g., Maricopa County Department of Public Health) instead of 'Arizona Department of Health Services', and updated contact info/emails instead of '@azdhs.gov' or '(602) 555-0147'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Heading 1' style is applied to Sections 3, 6, and 9.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sections 3, 6, and 9 should visually match the 'Heading 1' formatting of the other main sections (e.g., larger font size, specific spacing), rather than just being bolded paragraph text. The style dropdown in the toolbar should show 'Heading 1' when the cursor is on these sections.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified page header has been added to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'MARICOPA COUNTY – CONFIDENTIAL' should be visible in the header area at the top of the document pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Revision History table is included at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 4-column, 2-row table should be visible at the end of the document. The headers must be 'Version', 'Date', 'Author', and 'Description'. The second row must contain '2.0', '2025-01-15', 'Dr. Elena Sandoval-Cruz', and 'Adapted for Maricopa County use'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document is saved with the new specified filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor's title bar or a file manager window should display the filename 'maricopa_cd_response_manual.odt'.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application open with the document, rather than terminal commands (like sed or python scripts) being used to manipulate the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Check that the Revision History is a real table.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Revision History should have visible table gridlines or cell boundaries typical of a word processor table, not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Check that the file was properly saved as a new document from within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'Save As' dialog or the application title bar should update to the new filename, rather than the agent just copying/renaming the file in the terminal without verifying the contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required page header text is exactly 'MARICOPA COUNTY – CONFIDENTIAL'. The Revision History table must be exactly 4 columns by 2 rows with headers: Version | Date | Author | Description, and the data row: '2.0' | '2025-01-15' | 'Dr. Elena Sandoval-Cruz' | 'Adapted for Maricopa County use'. After applying the Heading 1 style to Sections 3, 6, and 9, and adding the Revision History heading, there should be exactly 11 'Heading 1' elements in the document. The final file must be named 'maricopa_cd_response_manual.odt'.
